loop1.title: Today's Energy
loop1.note: Showing today's active and reactive energy; subsidy/target/SEC are unconfigured constants (nameplate unknown).

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing active and reactive energy trends over the last 7 days. Rated and Contracted power lines are omitted because the asset's nameplate ratings are unknown. Average metrics are derived from total power using load factor approximations.

loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active power for Input/Output and derived loss/efficiency metrics; per-phase energy is not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing active power load factor as a proxy for load anomaly deviation — the meter does not log a dedicated 'load anomaly' or 'expected load' metric, so the load factor (actual vs rated) is used to highlight deviations from expected behavior.
